## Meeting Purpose

[Explore GrowthX's analytics needs and evaluate Hex as a potential solution for their data analysis requirements.](https://fathom.video/share/NCcYxgyqiL2gYWtZ15SS49HuwS5GiRh4?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX lacks robust analytics tooling; recently implemented Google Analytics](https://fathom.video/share/NCcYxgyqiL2gYWtZ15SS49HuwS5GiRh4?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
  - [Primary needs: multi-channel attribution, user journey tracking, campaign performance analysis](https://fathom.video/share/NCcYxgyqiL2gYWtZ15SS49HuwS5GiRh4?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
  - [Hex's event tracking limitations and data warehouse requirements may not align with GrowthX's current setup](https://fathom.video/share/NCcYxgyqiL2gYWtZ15SS49HuwS5GiRh4?tab=summary&timestamp=668.0)
  - [Bianca to discuss internally and revert by end of week on potential fit](https://fathom.video/share/NCcYxgyqiL2gYWtZ15SS49HuwS5GiRh4?tab=summary&timestamp=856.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Current Analytics Landscape

  - [Recently implemented Google Analytics (1.5 months into role)](https://fathom.video/share/NCcYxgyqiL2gYWtZ15SS49HuwS5GiRh4?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
  - [No prior analytics tracking for GrowthX (only for clients)](https://fathom.video/share/NCcYxgyqiL2gYWtZ15SS49HuwS5GiRh4?tab=summary&timestamp=125.0)
  - [Explored platforms like Plausible (GDPR compliant) but found unsuitable](https://fathom.video/share/NCcYxgyqiL2gYWtZ15SS49HuwS5GiRh4?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
  - [Bianca leads growth, owns website-related analytics, tracking, CRM](https://fathom.video/share/NCcYxgyqiL2gYWtZ15SS49HuwS5GiRh4?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)

### Analytics Needs and Use Cases

  - [Track returning users and campaign performance (e.g., programmatic landing pages)](https://fathom.video/share/NCcYxgyqiL2gYWtZ15SS49HuwS5GiRh4?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
  - [Measure success of upcoming product launches and publications (podcast, video)](https://fathom.video/share/NCcYxgyqiL2gYWtZ15SS49HuwS5GiRh4?tab=summary&timestamp=242.0)
  - [Attribute traffic sources and identify high-converting locations](https://fathom.video/share/NCcYxgyqiL2gYWtZ15SS49HuwS5GiRh4?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)
  - [Analyze user retention and pipeline progression](https://fathom.video/share/NCcYxgyqiL2gYWtZ15SS49HuwS5GiRh4?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)
  - [Multi-channel attribution (LinkedIn, email, podcasts, in-person events)](https://fathom.video/share/NCcYxgyqiL2gYWtZ15SS49HuwS5GiRh4?tab=summary&timestamp=458.0)
  - [Validate hypotheses and bets made at company level](https://fathom.video/share/NCcYxgyqiL2gYWtZ15SS49HuwS5GiRh4?tab=summary&timestamp=484.0)

### Current Challenges

  - [Manual, scrappy approach to data analysis](https://fathom.video/share/NCcYxgyqiL2gYWtZ15SS49HuwS5GiRh4?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)
  - [Lack of consistent user tracking from first touch to close](https://fathom.video/share/NCcYxgyqiL2gYWtZ15SS49HuwS5GiRh4?tab=summary&timestamp=502.0)
  - [No visibility into client content engagement or team website usage](https://fathom.video/share/NCcYxgyqiL2gYWtZ15SS49HuwS5GiRh4?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Difficulty in identifying and addressing customer issues in the pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/NCcYxgyqiL2gYWtZ15SS49HuwS5GiRh4?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)

### Hex Product Overview

  - [Notebooking feature for SQL and Python-based data analysis](https://fathom.video/share/NCcYxgyqiL2gYWtZ15SS49HuwS5GiRh4?tab=summary&timestamp=590.0)
  - [Visualization capabilities for sharing insights](https://fathom.video/share/NCcYxgyqiL2gYWtZ15SS49HuwS5GiRh4?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)
  - [Self-service features for deeper data exploration](https://fathom.video/share/NCcYxgyqiL2gYWtZ15SS49HuwS5GiRh4?tab=summary&timestamp=607.0)
  - [AI assistance for SQL and Python query writing](https://fathom.video/share/NCcYxgyqiL2gYWtZ15SS49HuwS5GiRh4?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Requires connection to a cloud-based data warehouse (e.g., Snowflake, Databricks, Redshift)](https://fathom.video/share/NCcYxgyqiL2gYWtZ15SS49HuwS5GiRh4?tab=summary&timestamp=789.0)

### Potential Limitations for GrowthX

  - [Hex doesn't provide event tracking capabilities (unlike Amplitude or Mixpanel)](https://fathom.video/share/NCcYxgyqiL2gYWtZ15SS49HuwS5GiRh4?tab=summary&timestamp=668.0)
  - [GrowthX currently lacks a data warehouse for storing analytics data](https://fathom.video/share/NCcYxgyqiL2gYWtZ15SS49HuwS5GiRh4?tab=summary&timestamp=774.0)
  - [SQL knowledge required (Bianca has basic SQL skills from a course)](https://fathom.video/share/NCcYxgyqiL2gYWtZ15SS49HuwS5GiRh4?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)

### Team and Usage

  - [Initially for Bianca and head of customer ops (3 users to start)](https://fathom.video/share/NCcYxgyqiL2gYWtZ15SS49HuwS5GiRh4?tab=summary&timestamp=568.0)
  - [Potential for expansion as the company grows](https://fathom.video/share/NCcYxgyqiL2gYWtZ15SS49HuwS5GiRh4?tab=summary&timestamp=571.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Tory to send async resources (product overview, demo recordings, documentation)](https://fathom.video/share/NCcYxgyqiL2gYWtZ15SS49HuwS5GiRh4?tab=summary&timestamp=878.0)
  - [Bianca to discuss internally about:](https://fathom.video/share/NCcYxgyqiL2gYWtZ15SS49HuwS5GiRh4?tab=summary&timestamp=856.0)
    1.  Whether event tracking is a deal-breaker
    2.  Possibility of setting up a data warehouse
  - [Bianca to provide feedback by end of week on whether to continue conversations or pause until better aligned with Hex's capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/NCcYxgyqiL2gYWtZ15SS49HuwS5GiRh4?tab=summary&timestamp=862.0)
